snippets.title: Create and use a conda environment
snippets.code:
conda create -n rag python=3.11
conda activate rag
conda install -c conda-forge numpy pandas
conda list
conda deactivate
snippets.explanation: Named environments pin a Python version; -c selects the channel to install from.

snippets.title: Declarative environment.yml
snippets.code:
name: rag
channels:
  - conda-forge
dependencies:
  - python=3.11
  - pytorch
  - numpy
  - pip
  - pip:
      - openai==1.40.0
      - tiktoken
snippets.explanation: conda handles compiled deps; the pip: block adds PyPI-only packages inside the same env.

snippets.title: Recreate and export
snippets.code:
conda env create -f environment.yml      # build the env from the file
conda env export > environment.yml       # capture the current env
conda env export --from-history > env.yml # only explicitly requested deps
snippets.explanation: --from-history yields a portable, less platform-locked spec than a full export.
